hero.headline: Paddle with strength. Grow in community.
hero.subheadline: MulanPaddlers is an all-women dragon boat team in the Greater Toronto Area. We train together, compete together, and grow stronger—on and off the water.

about.title: About MulanPaddlers
about.p1: MulanPaddlers is an all-women dragon boat team based in the GTA.
about.p2: We are committed to creating an inclusive and supportive environment where women of all backgrounds can discover the sport, build confidence, and form meaningful connections.
about.p3: Our team brings together individuals with different levels of experience, united by a shared goal—to improve, compete, and grow together.
about.p4: We value discipline, teamwork, and positive energy, while respecting different learning paces and personal goals.

programs.title: Training & Programs
programs.intro: Our training focuses on technique, strength, endurance, and team coordination in a structured and supportive environment.
programs.outro: We train with purpose and support each other at every stage.

gallery.title: Gallery
gallery.caption: From training sessions to race days, every moment reflects commitment, teamwork, and growth.

sponsorship.title: Partner With Us
sponsorship.p1: MulanPaddlers is an all-women dragon boat team committed to athletic excellence and community impact.
sponsorship.p2: We actively participate in competitions and community events, creating meaningful visibility opportunities for our partners.

offers.title: Sponsorship with MulanPaddlers offers:
items: Brand exposure at regattas and events
Visibility across social media and team communications
Association with a growing and positive women's sports community

sponsorship.p3: We welcome partnerships that align with our values and support the continued growth of women in sport.

items.q: Do I need prior dragon boat experience?
items.a: No. We welcome beginners and support paddlers at all levels.

items.q: Is this team only for women?
items.a: Yes. We are an all-women team focused on creating a supportive environment.

items.q: What should I bring to practice?
items.a: Athletic wear and water. Additional details will be shared before sessions.
Yes. We train seriously, while maintaining a supportive and respectful team culture.
Contact us via email or Instagram for current programs and trial sessions.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.intro: Interested in joining or collaborating with us? We'd love to hear from you.

join.title: Join the Team
join.intro: Whether you're a complete beginner or an experienced paddler, MulanPaddlers welcomes women of all backgrounds. Come try a session, meet the team, and find your place on the water.

tryout.label: Request a Tryout
tryout.desc: Send us an email to book a trial session. No experience needed — just bring your energy and curiosity.

register.label: Register to 2026 Program
register.desc: Ready to commit? Fill out the registration form to join our 2026 season lineup.

join.note: Questions? Reach us at mulanpaddlers@gmail.com or via Instagram @mulanpaddlers.

footer.tagline: MulanPaddlers — Women's Dragon Boat Team in the Greater Toronto Area
